original_abstract: Data for Sub-Task 1 of the Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation task at Touché 2025. The dataset contains segments retrieved from the segmented version of MS MARCO V2.1. The queries used in retrieval are taken from the Webis Generated Native Ads 2024 dataset.
humanized_abstract: Data for Sub-Task 1 of the Advertisement in Retrieval-Augmented Generation task at Touché 2025. The data used here consists of segments that were retrieved from the segmented MS MARCO V2.1 corpus. Queries for the retrieval were sampled from the Webis Generated Native Ads 2024 dataset.
